urdu transliteration text:
Ghabrai hai zainab aya hai madina Labrez hai gham se har bibi ka sina Zainab is anxious, Madina is here,Every lady’s heart is overflowing with immense griefEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Ik saal guzara hai zindan sitam mei Din baqi guzaregi zainab isi gham mei Maqtal me hai asgher zindaan mein sakina
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
They spent an age in the prison
Now the remaining days Zainab (a.s.) will spend in this grief
Asgher was left in the battlefield, and Sakina in the prison

Please do not say a word to Zainab (a.s.),
She will lose her last breaths (because of this grief)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab pursa mujhe denge sab log watan ke Kis tarha chupawungi yeh neel rasan ke Ehwaal safar ka kehde ye kahin na
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When the people of the city (of Madina) give me condolences,
How will I hide the marks of the ropes,
The state of my travels may reveal my pain

urdu transliteration text:
Hujro me jo jawungi me awno muhamad ke Is dil ko rulaenge bacho ke khilone Dil shidate gham se phat jaye kahi na
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When I will go into the room of Aun and Muhammad,
The site of their belongings will break my heart
My heart will break with their grief

urdu transliteration text:
Sab kuch to luta ai pardes me zainab Mazlooma musafir ye kya jeeke kare ab Bin bhayi ke ab to dushwar hai jina
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Zainab (a.s.) has lost everything in a distant land
What is the point of living now without her beloved brothers

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab ki khayalon me awaaz yeh aayi Mehmil se utar kar jab fiza ne sada di Dil thamlo bibi lo aya madina
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
There was a voice in Zainab’s (a.s.) head,
When Fizza came off the saddle and said: “brace yourself, Madina is here”
